_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to share meaningful insights about the context of an organization’s threat environment that improve its risk management posture.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to synthesize risk findings across multiple models and AI systems into coherent enterprise-level risk narratives suitable for senior management and board reporting.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI RM domain. RM-A-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-S-006 (RM, cosine: 0.554), DG-K-002 (DG, cosine: 0.513).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.3/10 (raw 0.632). Shared vocabulary: [ability, management, risk]. DCWF-only terms [context, environment, improve, insights, meaningful, organization] vs WIDAI-only terms [across, ai, board, coherent, enterprise, findings] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.875 (P=0.884, R=0.866). Balanced P/R — the 19-word DCWF element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Ability to share meaningful insights about the context of an organization’s thre" and "Ability to synthesize risk findings across multiple models and AI systems into c" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.555 < STS 0.632 (gap -0.077). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [context, environment, improve] and [across, ai, board] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.5%. Shared tokens: [ability, management, risk]. DCWF-only: [context, environment, improve, insights, meaningful, organization]. WIDAI-only: [across, ai, board, coherent, enterprise, findings].
